{% load i18n %}

{% trans 'Adding username' %}

{% trans 'After selecting your preferred' %} {% trans 'plan' %},{% trans "you'll need to provide us with your" %} TradingView {% trans 'username.' %}
{% trans 'The video below demonstrates where you can locate your username.' %}

{% trans 'Find the strategies' %}

{% trans "After submitting your username, please go to TradingView -> Products -> Supercharts. You will find the availble strategies under the 'Invite Only Scripts' section." %}
{% trans 'The video below demonstrates how to do that.' %}

{% trans 'Get the new strategies' %}

{% trans 'We release new strategies every few months. To gain access to them, simply visit the strategy page and click' %} {% trans "'Get Access'" %}.{% trans "If you're a member, you will receive access to the new strategies at no additional cost." %}

{% trans 'Having a trouble' %}

{% trans "If you've subscribed and encounter any issues with adding your TradingView username or accessing the strategies, please click" %} {% trans 'here' %} {% trans 'to contact us for assistance.' %}
